segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, sorry to bother you. My locker won't open.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: No problem. Do you remember the code you set?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I thought I did, but it keeps rejecting it.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Okay, I'll come take a look. Do you have an ID with you?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: My wallet is inside the locker, but I can show you my phone and membership email.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: That works. Happens all the time.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. I was worried I had done something wrong.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: No, these locks are just picky.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. I appreciate the help.
